use_cases: Display pricing plans for a video creation SaaS platform
Present tiered subscription options with feature comparison for content creators
Show pricing options with playful, hand-crafted aesthetic for creative tools
Highlight pricing tiers with color-coded feature lists for subscription services
ai_summary: A playful, creative pricing component featuring hand-drawn typography with decorative sparkles and stars. Designed with rotated text elements and colorful accents, this pricing table displays multiple tiers with icons, prices, and feature lists in an engaging grid layout. Ideal for video creation platforms, creator tools, and media SaaS products targeting content creators and social media users.
